# Container-Cloudflare

```mermaid
graph LR
  linkStyle default fill:#ffffff

  subgraph diagram ["Container View: Cloudflare"]
    style diagram fill:#ffffff,stroke:#ffffff

    10["<div style='font-weight: bold'>GitHub</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Software System]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>Source hosting, Actions<br />runtime, App identity<br />surface.</div>"]
    style 10 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff
    20["<div style='font-weight: bold'>GCP project (alunduil)</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Software System]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>Single GCP project —<br />Terraform state + CI deployer<br />identity.</div>"]
    style 20 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff
    37["<div style='font-weight: bold'>Squarespace registrar</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Software System]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>Holds the alunduil.com<br />registration and DS records<br />for DNSSEC.</div>"]
    style 37 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff
    38["<div style='font-weight: bold'>TP-Link DDNS</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Software System]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>alunduil.tplinkdns.com —<br />tracks the home WAN address.</div>"]
    style 38 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff
    39["<div style='font-weight: bold'>Keybase</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Software System]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>Domain verification via<br />_keybase.alunduil.com TXT.</div>"]
    style 39 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff
    40["<div style='font-weight: bold'>Bluesky (AT Protocol)</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Software System]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>Handle verification via<br />_atproto.alunduil.com TXT.</div>"]
    style 40 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff

    subgraph 30 ["Cloudflare"]
      style 30 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#6b6b6b

      31["<div style='font-weight: bold'>alunduil.com zone</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Container: Zone]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>Authoritative NS =<br />brenna/vick.ns.cloudflare.com;<br />DNSSEC active</div>"]
      style 31 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff
      32["<div style='font-weight: bold'>Zone settings</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Container: Settings]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>SSL=strict, min-TLS=1.2,<br />always-use-https=on</div>"]
      style 32 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff
      33["<div style='font-weight: bold'>DNS records</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Container: DNS]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>blog/home/plex CNAMEs;<br />_keybase / _atproto TXT</div>"]
      style 33 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff
      34["<div style='font-weight: bold'>deployer-ro token</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Container: API token]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>Zone+DNS+Settings Read on<br />alunduil.com</div>"]
      style 34 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff
      35["<div style='font-weight: bold'>deployer-rw token</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Container: API token]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>Zone Read, DNS+Settings Write<br />on alunduil.com</div>"]
      style 35 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff
      36["<div style='font-weight: bold'>master token</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Container: API token (ephemeral)]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>Operator-only; minted before<br />bootstrap apply, revoked<br />after</div>"]
      style 36 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff
    end
